data.content: Implementation review approved. Per-beat disclosure toggle correctly implemented: each RetakeRow owns local useState(false) for collapsed-by-default behavior. Steps, notes, and handoff capsules are all gated behind showExpandedDetails. Description remains always visible. ChevronRight icon with rotate-90 transition and proper aria-expanded/aria-label attributes. Page-level Switch fully removed. Tests cover default-collapsed state, section gating, and absence of page-level toggle (4/4 pass). No security issues or regressions.
